prestazioni: Engine swap to a fully built **L77 455ci (W-30-spec) block** with forged internals: Manley 4340 forged crankshaft (3.975" stroke), Eagle H-beam connecting rods (6.800" length), and JE forged aluminum pistons (10.5:1 compression ratio) with Total Seal rings. Pair with a **Crane Cams hydraulic roller camshaft** (280°/288° duration, 0.580" lift, 112° LSA) and **Crane Gold Race roller rockers** (1.6:1 ratio) for aggressive valvetrain performance.

Induction system upgrade: **Edelbrock Victor Jr. W-30 intake manifold** (aluminum, high-rise design) paired with a **Holley 950 HP Ultra XP carburetor** (mechanical secondary, 950 CFM) and **Hooker Super Competition headers** (1.75" primary tubes, 3" collectors) with 3" dual exhaust and **Flowmaster Super 44 mufflers** (straight-through design, 3" in/out).

Forced induction conversion: **ProCharger F-1X centrifugal supercharger** (10-12 psi boost, polished finish) with a **Vortech air-to-water intercooler** (10" x 12" core) and **FAST XFI Sportsman ECU** (standalone management for boost control, fuel, and ignition timing). Supporting mods include a **Moroso 8-quart oil pan** (deep sump, windage tray) and **ATI Super Damper** (6.75" diameter, SFI 18.1 certified).
estetica: Bodywork: **YearOne 1970 Oldsmobile 442 W-30 fiberglass replica hood** (functional ram-air scoop, matte black finish) paired with **US Mag 15x8" Rally I wheels** (ET 0 offset, polished lip) wrapped in **BFGoodrich g-Force Rival S 2 tires** (245/60R15 front, 275/60R15 rear). Fender flares from **Goodmark Industries** (bolt-on, OEM-style) to accommodate wider tires.

Exterior trim: **Danchuk Manufacturing W-30-specific decal kit** (correct gold/black stripes, door jamb badges) with **PPG Deltron 2000 basecoat/clearcoat** in **1970 Oldsmobile Rallye Red** (code 72). Brightwork includes **OER billet aluminum door handles** and **Scott Drake chrome valve covers** (W-30 script, polished finish).

Interior: **Auto Meter Pro-Comp gauges** (3.5" tachometer, 2.5" oil pressure/voltage/water temp) in a **Lokar billet aluminum dash panel** (W-30 logo engraved). Seating upgrade to **Recaro SRD bucket seats** (black vinyl, red stitching) with **Schroth 4-point harnesses** (SFI 16.1 certified). Steering wheel swap to a **Grant Classic 14" wood-rim wheel** (W-30 horn button) on a **Flaming River tilt column**.
